Anything else? (Optional)

Is there anything else we should know about your candidacy or interest in Sierra?

Diversity Survey

This optional survey is collected by Sierra Technologies, Inc. to help us evaluate our diversity and inclusion efforts. Participation is voluntary and refusal to submit the survey will not affect your job application. If you submit the survey, your responses will not be used to assess your candidacy or make hiring decisions and will only be used to assess our diversity and inclusion efforts. Access to your responses will be limited to authorized personnel and your responses will not be seen on an individualized basis. For more information about how we collect, use, disclose and store personal information, including how to contact us, please see our Privacy Policy at https://sierra.ai/privacy-policy.
